cells.html:
Add a single airport to the autotrack list.
Removes a single airport from the autotrack list.

cells.html:
Adds autotrack of all ZHU controlled airports.
Adds autotrack of 24/7 towered airports. Used for late night (0300Z+) center operations.
cells.text: Adds autotrack of all ZHU controlled airports. Adds autotrack of 24/7 towered airports. Used for late night (0300Z+) center operations.

cells.html:
Adds autotrack of specified TRACON airports.
Use notrack after TRACON to remove those airports from the autotrack list: .I90notrack
cells.text: Adds autotrack of specified TRACON airports. Use notrack after TRACON to remove those airports from the autotrack list: .I90notrack

intro.html: All chart recall commands open the selected FAA chart in your computer's default browser.
intro.text: All chart recall commands open the selected FAA chart in your computer's default browser.

intro.html:
Single digit runways include a leading 0 UNLESS an approach variation AND/OR sidedness designator is used.
If a double-digit runway includes approach variation AND/OR sidedness, the leading digit is omitted.
Do not forget the C following all chart recall aliases.
intro.text: Single digit runways include a leading 0 UNLESS an approach variation AND/OR sidedness designator is used. If a double-digit runway includes approach variation AND/OR sidedness, the leading digit is omitted. Do not forget the C following all chart recall aliases.
